title: neural-avalanche-utac — P20: Brain Criticality & Neuronal Avalanche Threshold
description:
neural-avalanche-utac applies UTAC (Universal Threshold Activation Criticality) to neurophysiological data to detect criticality signatures in neural avalanche cascades. The UTAC-Logistic ODE identifies critical branching ratios and threshold transitions in LFP/spike time series consistent with brain criticality theory. CREP metrics measure coherence and emergent information integration across cortical network states.

Part of the GenesisAeon ecosystem (P20, domain: neuroscience / cortical criticality). Within the GenesisAeon CREP Criticality Spectrum, this package's characteristic coupling value is Γ ≈ 0.251.

See github.com/GenesisAeon/neural-avalanche-utac for source, documentation, and reproducibility notebooks.
